subcodes.first_line: The whole world hath been called into being from nothingness for the purpose of attaining unto the presence of the Throne of Him Who conversed upon Sinai, and when the Sun of Truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع عالم از برای حضور سریر مکلم طور از عدم بوجود آمده و چون آفتاب حقیقت از
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @prayer for children and youth, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
